context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements duplicate-safe license key import, uses a database transaction to prevent concurrent double-assignment of keys, properly updates all fields on assignment, and implements inventory monitoring with the correct low-stock threshold and groupBy pattern.

checklist.name: Duplicate key check on import
checklist.description: importLicenseKeys queries the database for existing keys matching those in the incoming batch before inserting

checklist.name: Duplicate rejection response
checklist.description: importLicenseKeys returns an HTTP 400 response with an error field and a 'duplicates' array listing the conflicting keys when duplicates are found

checklist.name: Transaction for assignment
checklist.description: assignLicenseKey wraps the findFirst + update in a single database transaction (e.g., db.$transaction or equivalent)

checklist.name: Status filter on findFirst
checklist.description: assignLicenseKey queries for a license with status: 'available' (not all licenses for the product)

checklist.name: Status updated to 'sold'
checklist.description: The update inside assignLicenseKey sets status to 'sold'

checklist.name: orderId set on assignment
checklist.description: The update inside assignLicenseKey sets orderId to the provided orderId

checklist.name: soldAt set on assignment
checklist.description: The update inside assignLicenseKey sets soldAt to the current timestamp (new Date() or equivalent)

checklist.name: Low stock threshold of 10
checklist.description: checkLicenseKeyStockLevels uses a threshold of exactly 10 remaining keys to determine low stock

checklist.name: groupBy with having clause
checklist.description: checkLicenseKeyStockLevels uses a groupBy query on productId with a having/_count condition to find low-stock products, rather than loading all keys and filtering in application code

checklist.name: Admin notification sent
checklist.description: checkLicenseKeyStockLevels calls notifyAdmin (or equivalent) for each low-stock product found
